news.t: Gabelli Launches Sports-Focused ETF: GOLS – Gabelli Opportunities in Live and Sports

holdings.infoBox: GOLS is an equity ETF with a total of 46 individual holdings. The top holdings are United States Treasury Bills 0% stock at 8.80%, Madison Square Garden Sports at 7.86%, Atlanta Braves Holdings at 6.44%, Formula One Group at 5.26%, and Rogers Communications at 4.79%.

overview.description: The Gabelli Opportunities in Live and Sports ETF (GOLS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed, focusing on companies included in the live media, entertainment, and sports sectors. It selects securities without regard to market-cap and may hold foreign securities directly or through ADRs. GOLS was launched on Jan 2, 2026 and is issued by GAMCO Investors.

data.title: Gabelli Funds rolls out sports ETF under ticker symbol GOLS
data.text: Chris Marangi, Value Co-CIO, joins 'Closing Bell Overtime' to talk its sports focused ETF under the ticker GOLS.

data.title: Gabelli Launches Sports-Focused ETF: GOLS – Gabelli Opportunities in Live and Sports
